mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 60% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.0 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that compress corporate earnings expectations and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in over 55% of months where UNRATE exceeds 4.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals robust consumer spending and construction activity, which jointly drive positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a t-statistic above 1.5 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during late-cycle expansions indicates capacity utilization approaching limits, prompting equity investors to price in imminent growth deceleration and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict negative 5-day returns during late-cycle periods, with a mean forward return exceeding zero.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate profit margins and forces central banks to tighten policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive CPIAUCSL month-over-month changes correlate with positive 20-day forward returns in over 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Nonfarm payrolls additions exceeding 200,000 per month confirm strong labor demand that supports consumer spending and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Months with PAYEMS above 200,000 yield negative 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and retail sales validates broad-based economic demand, which reinforces earnings revisions and drives positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS growth rates shows a negative or statistically insignificant coefficient in predicting 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises faster than inflation during an inflationary tightening regime, real rates become restrictive and trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Periods where FEDFUNDS outpaces CPIAUCSL growth produce positive 5-day forward returns in over 55% of instances.
